hero.description: TalepNET helps organizations of every size automate procurement with AI-supported workflows, stronger traceability, and a connected supplier network.

services.title: Build procurement workflows with a guided setup
services.description: TalepNET gives teams a more structured way to manage requests, approvals, supplier collaboration, and orders in one connected system.

items.title: Procurement Workflows
items.description: Set up procurement flows that fit your organization and manage approval paths with more control.

items.title: Online RFQs and Orders
items.description: Send RFQs, collect supplier responses, approve decisions, and place orders through one workflow.

items.title: Supplier Network
items.description: Find suppliers by category, review commercial context, and expand your vendor base more efficiently.

feature.title: Track key procurement data in one place
feature.description: Whether you are scaling fast or coordinating a larger organization, TalepNET brings operational data into one clearer control layer.

featureV2.title: Procurement gets easier when the flow stays connected
featureV2.description: TalepNET helps teams move from demand to approval and execution with fewer breaks in the process.

items.title: Request Management
items.description: Capture purchasing demand with clearer structure and better visibility.

items.title: Order Management
items.description: Move from approved demand into purchase orders with less manual handoff.

items.title: Approval Flows
items.description: Keep approvals visible through automated or configurable workflow paths.

integration.title: Templates and tools
integration.description: Simplify setup with ready-to-use templates and connect more easily with ERP, accounting, and logistics systems.

process.title: Get your procurement flow running in three steps
process.description: Move procurement into a cleaner digital workflow with TalepNET.

supplierManagement.description: Strengthen supplier relationships, speed up quotation activity, and keep more control across your procurement chain with TalepNET.
